compiled_state.title: As the fix-bug orchestrator, I read a hard gate in the preamble preventing code modification before Steps 1-5
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Add a hard gate block to the fix-bug SKILL.md preamble that explicitly states Steps 1-5 must complete before any code modification.
**Why**: Agents sometimes read the skill but rationalize skipping steps because the bug "looks simple." A prominent hard gate at the top of the skill reinforces the sequential requirement.
**Scope**:
- IN: Add HARD-GATE block to SKILL.md preamble (similar pattern to brainstorm skill)
- OUT: Orchestrator enforcement logic (stories 91bf-a66b, b094-3cf4)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, the fix-bug SKILL.md contains a HARD-GATE block in the preamble that explicitly prohibits code modification before completing Steps 1-5 (classify, investigate, hypothesis test, approve, RED test)
  ← Satisfies: "The fix-bug SKILL.md preamble includes a hard gate reinforcing that Steps 1-5 must complete before any code modification"
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Use the same HARD-GATE tag pattern used in brainstorm SKILL.md for consistency
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ — Added test_fix_bug_skill_hard_gate_present and test_fix_bug_skill_hard_gate_prohibits_code_before_steps to tests/hooks/test-fix-bug-skill.sh and TestHardGatePreamble class to tests/skills/test_fix_bug_skill.py. Confirmed tests fail (RED) before implementation.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — Added HARD-GATE block to plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md preamble after intro paragraph, before Config Resolution section. Block explicitly states Steps 1-5 must complete before any code modification.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — ruff check passes, test-fix-bug-skill.sh 12/12 PASSED, acceptance criteria verified: HARD-GATE block present and references steps 1-5.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All acceptance criteria verified: (1) HARD-GATE block present in SKILL.md, (2) HARD-GATE prohibits code modification before Steps 1-5, (3) ruff check passes, (4) test-fix-bug-skill.sh 12/12 PASSED. Fixed pre-existing F841 ruff error (unused old_pattern_lines variable) in test_fix_bug_skill.py as a bonus cleanup.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Added HARD-GATE block to fix-bug SKILL.md preamble enforcing Steps 1-5 before code modification. Pattern matches brainstorm SKILL.md. 4 tests added (2 bash, 2 python).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
